sources.writer_profile: Lauren and Jesse Stuart are a couple who left their corporate careers in Missouri in 2017 to travel full-time, documenting their experiences on the Wandering Stus travel blog. Their Chefchaouen dining guide draws on a personal visit to the medina, with recommendations focused on finding authentic Moroccan food away from the tourist-heavy main square. Their writing reflects a pragmatic, experience-first approach to food travel with practical pricing guidance.
sources.article_title: Where to Eat in Chefchaouen, Morocco

restaurants.name: Restaurant Casa Aladdin
restaurants.quote: Located at the Northeast end of the main square, you'll find this multi-story restaurant that serves up amazing Moroccan dishes. Once at the top, you'll have the main square of Chefchaouen's Medina in front of you (where you can hear live music) and the blue cities stacked houses behind you.
restaurants.article_title: Where to Eat in Chefchaouen, Morocco

restaurants.name: Restaurant Bab Ssour
restaurants.quote: Located not too far away from Restaurant Casa Aladdin, you'll find Restaurant Bab Ssour — tucked away, down a side alley, leaving it to be not as crowded as the restaurants you'll walk past in the main square. Our favorite restaurant in Chefchaouen and it should not be missed by you.
restaurants.article_title: Where to Eat in Chefchaouen, Morocco
